The '''''Immobilizer''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was used to prevent enemy ships from entering to hyperspace.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
